articles.author: Zack Whittaker

articles.title: Alibaba’s Qwen tech lead steps down after major AI push
articles.description: Reactions rippled through Alibaba's Qwen team after tech lead Junyang Lin stepped down following a major model launch.
articles.author: Jagmeet Singh

articles.title: Just three companies dominated the $189B in VC investments last month
articles.description: Crunchbase data shows a record $189 billion of global venture capital flowed to startups last month, with AI startups nabbing 90% of the capital.
articles.author: Dominic-Madori Davis

articles.title: TikTok down for some in US, thanks to second Oracle outage since sale
articles.description: TikTok experienced a similar outage just days after ByteDance divested the app's U.S. operations.
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.description: A tech billionaire-backed super PAC is spending $125 million to undercut candidates pushing for AI regulation. New York's Alex Bores, a former tech
articles.author: Rebecca Bellan

articles.title: ChatGPT’s new GPT-5.3 Instant model will stop telling you to calm down
articles.description: The company says the new model will reduce the "cringe" that's been annoying its users for months.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Anduril aims at $60 billion valuation in new funding round
articles.description: The funding round would come less than a year after Anduril's Series G, which closed in June with $2.5 billion against a $30 billion valuation.
articles.author: Russell Brandom

articles.title: Claude Code rolls out a voice mode capability
articles.description: Anthropic is stepping up its game in the AI coding space with the rollout of Voice Mode in Claude Code.

articles.title: Android users can now share tracker tag info with airlines to help locate lost luggage
articles.description: More than 10 global airlines now accept Find Hub locations as part of their baggage recovery process.

articles.title: X says it will suspend creators from revenue-sharing program for unlabeled AI posts of ‘armed conflict’
articles.description: Creators who break the rules will get a three-month suspension, and if they continue to violate the policy, they'll be permanently banned.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: The new MacBook Pro laptops are as much as $400 more expensive than their predecessors. Thank the RAM shortage.
articles.description: With the demands for more computers and data centers to power AI, the market is experiencing a shortage of RAM, causing memory prices to surge.
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai

articles.title: Activist investor Elliott takes a $1B stake in Pinterest, betting on AI-driven growth
articles.description: The news comes as Pinterest has faced serious headwinds. Shares tumbled over the past year, with disappointing earnings, layoffs affecting 15% of its
articles.author: Lauren Forristal

articles.title: Apple’s rumored MacBook Neo, a lower-cost, colorful laptop, could launch this week
articles.description: This would mark the first time Apple competes with cheaper hardware like the Chromebook.
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: Amid new competition, Chrome speeds up its release schedule
articles.description: Google Chrome will begin shipping new releases every two weeks in September, instead of monthly.

articles.title: X begins testing standalone X Chat app on iOS
articles.description: The new app promises a way to send and receive messages without being distracted by your timeline.

articles.title: Apple unveils new MacBook Air and MacBook Pro with M5
articles.description: These updated M5 chips were specifically designed to make the MacBook Air and MacBook Pro laptops better at handling intensive AI tasks.

articles.title: Apple’s new Studio Displays come with Thunderbolt 5
articles.description: The new displays come with better cameras, new sound systems, and Thunderbolt 5 ports.

articles.title: Cursor has reportedly surpassed $2B in annualized revenue
articles.description: The four-year-old startup saw its revenue run rate double over the past three months, according to one Bloomberg source.

articles.title: India’s Pronto formalizes house help as its valuation jumps 8x in under a year
articles.description: Pronto handles 18,000 daily bookings and plans rapid expansion as it races rivals to digitize India's largely offline home services market.

articles.title: ChatGPT uninstalls surged by 295% after DoD deal
articles.description: Many consumers ditched ChatGPT's app after news of its DoD deal went live, while Claude's downloads grew.
